title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 3: Step Potential
desc: Analyzes reflection and transmission coefficients for a step potential, verifying probability conservation.

title: Non-Relativistic Limit in QFT
desc: Leading order effects and NR limit of charged scalar particles with massless exchange.

title: Classical Limit of Light Bending
desc: Analyzing phase shifts and classical limit in light bending via graviton exchange.

title: Ergosphere Observer Angular Velocity Range
desc: Derives allowed angular velocity range for observers inside ergosphere, approaching horizon.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 9: Pauli Matrices
desc: Proofs of Pauli matrix identities, ladder operators, and projection operators.

title: 统计力学第10次作业：自由电子气体
desc: 计算绝对零度下自由电子气体的平均速率、费米能量、内能和简并压。

title: Interferometer Noise Composition and Quantum Noise
desc: Analysis of noise sources in Advanced LIGO, focusing on quantum noise and thermal noise contributions.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 8: Angular Momentum
desc: Proofs of commutator identities for angular momentum and vector operators.

title: Debye Model: Partition Function and Thermodynamics
desc: Derives ln Z, internal energy, and entropy for solids at high and low temperatures using Debye spectrum.

title: Photon Field Energy-Momentum Tensor
desc: Derivation of gauge invariant, traceless energy-momentum tensor for photon field.

title: Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem Proof
desc: Demonstrates Lorentz invariance of inner product and proves optical theorem via S-matrix unitarity.

title: Dyson Series and On-Shell Factorization
desc: Derivation of Dyson series for transition amplitude with source and on-shell factorization theorem steps.

title: Spinor Helicity for Null Momentum with p0<0
desc: Derives spinor expressions for null momentum with negative energy and shows transformation under LGTs.

title: Vanishing All-Plus Gluon Amplitude
desc: Tree-level all-plus 4-gluon amplitude vanishes; u-channel factorization for + + - - case.

title: Massless Amplitudes and Spinor Helicity
desc: Introduces spinor helicity formalism for massless amplitudes using Lorentz group decomposition.

title: Bose-Einstein Condensation in 2D and 3D
desc: Proof that 2D ideal Bose gas has no BEC; 3D harmonic trap BEC critical temperature.

title: QFT Perspective on Field Theory
desc: Relativistic quantum theory with Hamiltonian, perturbation theory, and photon field.

title: 量子力学第6次作业：中心力场分析
desc: 二体系统动能算符分解及势阱束缚态超越方程推导。

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 7
desc: Seventh assignment covering key quantum mechanics concepts.

title: Feynman Diagrams for Beginners
desc: Introduction to Feynman diagrams with exercises, covering Dirac equation and QED cross-section calculation.
link: /physics/Quantum Physics/Quantum Field Theory/Feynman Diagrams for Beginners

title: Phase Transition Thermodynamics Proofs
desc: Derives molar internal energy change and latent heat variation with temperature.

title: 统计力学第6次作业：二维气体速度分布
desc: 推导二维气体速度分布，计算平均、最概然和方均根速率，以及相对速度分布。

title: Lecture 6: Chasse_neige and Four Particle Test
desc: Analyzing four-particle amplitudes using on-shell factorization and consistency conditions.

title: Gravitational Waves: Generation, Propagation, Detection
desc: Linearized gravity approximation for gravitational wave analysis with Einstein equations.
link: /physics/General Relativity/Gravitational Waves/Gravitational Waves Formation and Propagation

title: 统计力学第7次作业分析
desc: 计算爱因斯坦固体熵和顺磁固体磁化强度与磁化率。

title: 量子力学对称性与守恒量作业分析
desc: 证明自由粒子角动量守恒及Feynman-Hellmann定理。

title: On-Shell Factorization in Light Bulb Model
desc: Analyzes Green function poles and on-shell factorization with scalar particles.

title: Proving Killing Vectors in Schwarzschild Metric
desc: Show that δ^μ_t and δ^μ_φ are Killing vectors of Schwarzschild metric.

title: General Relativity Homework 5 Analysis
desc: Calculate connection and Ricci tensor for a time-relevant metric.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 4: Operator Properties
desc: Proofs of inverse Hermitian conjugate and generalized uncertainty relation.
